gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands tall, smiles widely, and gestures invitingly with both arms while introducing today's lesson on addition
a person leans slightly forward, raises both hands enthusiastically, and encourages excitement about using fun objects for addition
a tutor picks up five red blocks with one hand and five blue blocks with the other, showing them to the class
a person moves both hands together in a scooping motion, inviting students to think about how many blocks they will have combined
a tutor holds up three fingers on one hand, directing attention to the fingers while encouraging everyone to join in
a person extends the other hand, raises four fingers, and looks at the class while asking how many fingers they can count
a tutor claps hands together joyfully, steps forward, and beams with pride while congratulating the class on their learning
a person gestures with both hands toward an imaginary number line, emphasizing the importance of addition in finding totals
